title: [Courting Controversy] One game, many suspects: The expanding scope of India’s Online Gaming Rules
description: Among Us, developed by the American game studio Innersloth, is a multiplayer social deduction game premised on collective suspicion. Players collaborate aboard a spaceship while attempting to identify the hidden impostor covertly sabotaging their mission. The game’s central dynamic, however, lies in how quickly suspicion escapes the confines of the actual imposter. As uncertainty deepens, every participant gradually becomes both the observer and the suspect, with players constantl
